channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti, 9th May
item.description:
Lugard Road Just after service Road to 30-44 . Remove graffiti from cable box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lugard Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5 candle grove lamppost light not working again. No light, 9th May
item.description:
4 days Lamppost on the 5 candle grove London SE15 3JW not working.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Candle Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 9th May
item.description:
30-44 Lugard Road remove graffiti from cable box at side of block

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lugard Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish every where, 9th May
item.description:
Picked up someone for the second time in 2 months .Each time while waiting I noticed only one rubbish bin in a corner .Cigarette butts all over the place and rubbish ,hasn’t been swept in ages if ever lots of piles of dirts and leaves not a very good impression for a hospital

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mortimer Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light leaning over, 9th May
item.description:
Lugard Road outside Evan Cook Close Street light is leaning over. Appears to have been hit

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lugard Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous potholes on this stretch of road, 9th May
item.description:
The potholes have been here a while and have been flagged as an issue numerous times by neighbours and my husband. I’m flagging them again as the heavy traffic of buses and lorries on the street cause the building to shake quite dramatically. This is causing my 2 small children’s sleep to be very disrupted and is therefore effecting their health and becoming a danger to their well being. Not to mention the damage being caused to the buildings. Please can this be repaired asap. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous potholes on this stretch of road, 9th May
item.description:
The potholes have been here for a while and have been flagged numerous times by neighbours and my husband. I’m flagging again as the huge amount of buses and lorries going over the potholes cause our whole building to shake quite dramatically and this is causing my 2 small children to have very broken nights sleep which is effecting them badly and is a danger to their health. Not to mention damaging our building.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Croydon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hope the camera captured the nasty person who left this, 9th May
item.description:
Northfield Road EN3 opposite the junction with Chester Gardens beside the green BT box. Domestic refuse in two bags. Please tell me you have this on camera 🤞🏼🤞🏼🤞🏼🤔

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Suffolk Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in front of the tarn bird sanctuary, 9th May
item.description:
There’s a dead fox in front of the fence of The Tarn. It’s between the two entrances of the park.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Court Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 9th May
item.description:
2 Luganda Road Remove graffiti from doors

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lugard Road, Nunhead, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping between 50-58 chestnut rise, 9th May
item.description:
Beds and mattress left outside 50-58 chestnut rise

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Armstrong Road, Woolwich

item.title: Tree has died after being pruned last year, 9th May
item.description:
This is a potential hazard if the tree falls as it near a footpath and gardens.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, The Spinney, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping of large items rubbish and dangerous items, 9th May
item.description:
People are dumping all items in the cul-de-sac we even have laughing gas bottles that have been there for weeks no Street cleaners come and clean the streets there are young children in this cul-de-sac. They could pick up any of these items and cause harm

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Primrose Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No right turn sign has been defaced, 9th May
item.description:
Someone put some paint on the sign to mask it. Cars are turning right even though they are not supposed to.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Malwood Road, Balham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish /food/rats, 9th May
item.description:
Disgusting food and house hold waste dummped right outside the police station ?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Riverdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 22 Beatty rd, 9th May
item.description:
Clothes dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All along Salisbury, 9th May
item.description:
Food waste bins stuffed with rubbish. This was very much predictable as you have removed all the bins in that part of the high street and the one remaining in is full by mid morning. Please do something about these latest unsanitary eye sores.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Street bin needs emptying

item.title: Outside dexters - Hartland road NW6, 9th May
item.description:
This area is supposed to be swept daily. Cigarette butts and urine bottle and other rubbish need sweeping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartland Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypostering, 9th May
item.description:
Linguards road opposite Southwark Council offices. Please remove flypostering from cable box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lugard Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Grover’s, 9th May
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
